---
name: 功能建議 / Feature Request
about: 提出新功能或改進建議 / Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
中文使用者請直接填寫下方表單。
English users: fill in the English fields below.
-->

## 功能描述 / Feature Description

簡明扼要地描述你希望增加的功能。  
Briefly describe the feature you would like added.

## 使用場景 / Use Case

描述在什麼情況下需要這個功能。  
Describe the situation where this feature would be useful.

## 期望實現 / Proposed Solution

描述你期望這個功能如何工作。  
Describe how you would expect this feature to work.

## 備選方案 / Alternatives Considered

描述你考慮過的其他替代方案。  
Describe any alternative solutions you have considered.

## 相關資訊 / Additional Context

- 是否願意貢獻程式碼實現 / Willing to implement: [Yes / No]
- 參考連結 / Reference links:
- 其他說明 / Other notes:
